user.title: FusionSolar App
user.description: Enter your FusionSolar (Huawei) account credentials. The regional server and devices will be detected automatically.

pick_device.title: Select charger
pick_device.description: Multiple EV chargers were found on your account. Pick the one to monitor.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to FusionSolar. Check your internet connection.
error.no_devices: No EV charger devices were found on this account and server combination.
